title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Urban Ladder - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Urban Ladder - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Ladder family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
